foundation.description: Core Electron shell, IPC wiring, PATH resolution, config, and shared renderer infrastructure

state-machine.description: 5-state UI state machine (IDLE, RECORDING, THINKING, PROMPT_READY, ERROR), CSS tokens, DOM structure, window resize IPC. HISTORY state was added (F-HISTORY) then removed (deferred to React migration).

first-run.description: Launch-time splash screen with CLI + mic checks before main bar shows; replaces in-bar FIRST_RUN state (D-007)

speech-recording.description: MediaRecorder audio capture → Whisper CLI transcription (--language en hardcoded) → originalTranscript captured once; transitions to THINKING
speech-recording.notes: Originally built with webkitSpeechRecognition, retrofitted to MediaRecorder + Whisper. Language flag removed 2026-04-19 — hardcoded to en.

claude-integration.description: Claude CLI spawn via generate-prompt IPC; 6 prompt modes (balanced/detailed/concise/chain/code/design); right-click mode context menu

actions.description: PROMPT_READY action buttons: Copy (clipboard + green flash 1.8s), Edit (contenteditable + Escape/Done), Regenerate (originalTranscript re-run)

dark-mode.description: macOS dark/light mode support: body.light CSS token overrides for all states, nativeTheme IPC (get-theme + theme-changed), applied at boot and on system change

files.evidence: nativeTheme import, get-theme IPC handler, nativeTheme.on('updated') → theme-changed send
getTheme() and onThemeChanged() exposed via contextBridge
body.light CSS block + getTheme().then() at boot + onThemeChanged listener

dark-mode.notes: body.light toggled orthogonally to app state — never routed through setState()

tray.description: macOS menu bar tray icon: Show/Hide + Quit menu, app stays alive when window closed, Dock icon hidden

files.evidence: createTray(), updateTrayMenu(), tray var, app.dock.hide(), window-all-closed updated

history.description: Prompt history: saveToHistory/loadHistory (capped at 20), HISTORY state panel, history pill in IDLE, btn in PROMPT_READY. REMOVED 2026-04-19.
history.deletion_reason: Deferred to React migration — localStorage history schema would create backwards-compatibility debt in new stack

files.evidence: All history CSS, DOM, JS removed in feat(history): remove F-HISTORY commit

language.description: Multi-language speech: LANGUAGES constant (12 entries), language pill in IDLE, Whisper --language flag, show-language-menu IPC. REMOVED 2026-04-19.
language.deletion_reason: Whisper tiny model non-English transcription quality was unusable — output bore no resemblance to spoken input

files.evidence: show-language-menu IPC removed; transcribe-audio language param removed
